name: summarize-youtube-video-with-ai
title: Summarize YouTube Videos with AI
description: Summarize any YouTube Video with AI. Choose between Raycast, OpenAI or Anthropic. You have to either be a Raycast Pro Member or have an OpenAI/Anthropic API Key.
author: kom

commands.name: summarizeVideoWithRaycast
commands.title: Summarize YouTube Video with Raycast
commands.description: Use Raycast to create a summary of any YouTube video.

preferences.name: creativity
preferences.title: Creativity
preferences.description: Choose how creative the AI should be.

preferences.name: language
preferences.title: Language
preferences.description: Define the language which the AI should use to summarize the video.

commands.name: summarizeVideoWithOpenAI
commands.title: Summarize YouTube Video with OpenAI
commands.description: Use OpenAI to create a summary of any YouTube video.

preferences.name: creativity
preferences.title: Creativity
preferences.description: Choose how creative the AI should be.

preferences.name: openaiApiToken
preferences.title: OpenAI API Key
preferences.description: Your OpenAI API Key. Required if you choose ChatGPT as your AI.

preferences.name: openaiEndpoint
preferences.title: OpenAI Endpoint
preferences.description: Choose a custom OpenAI(-compatible) endpoint to use.

preferences.name: openaiModel
preferences.title: OpenAI Model
preferences.description: Choose the OpenAI model to use. Defaults to `gpt-5-mini`.

preferences.name: language
preferences.title: Language
preferences.description: Define the language which the AI should use to summarize the video.

commands.name: summarizeVideoWithAnthropic
commands.title: Summarize YouTube Video with Anthropic
commands.description: Use Anthropic to create a summary of any YouTube video.

preferences.name: creativity
preferences.title: Creativity
preferences.description: Choose how creative the AI should be.

preferences.name: anthropicApiToken
preferences.title: Anthropic API Key
preferences.description: Your Anthropic API Key. Required if you choose Anthropic Claude as your AI.

preferences.name: anthropicModel
preferences.title: Anthropic Model
preferences.description: Choose the Anthropic model to use. Defaults to `claude-haiku-4-5`.

preferences.name: language
preferences.title: Language
preferences.description: Define the language which the AI should use to summarize the video.

commands.name: summarizeVideoWithOllama
commands.title: Summarize YouTube Video with Ollama
commands.description: Use Ollama to create a summary of any YouTube video.

preferences.name: creativity
preferences.title: Creativity
preferences.description: Choose how creative the AI should be.

preferences.name: ollamaEndpoint
preferences.title: Ollama Endpoint
preferences.description: The endpoint URL for your Ollama instance (e.g. http://localhost:11434/v1)

preferences.name: ollamaModel
preferences.title: Ollama Model
preferences.description: Choose the Ollama model to use. Defaults to `llama3.2:latest`.

preferences.name: language
preferences.title: Language
preferences.description: Define the language which the AI should use to summarize the video.

preferences.name: creativity
preferences.title: Creativity
preferences.description: Choose how creative the AI should be.

preferences.name: language
preferences.title: Language
preferences.description: Define the language which Raycast AI should use to answer video questions.

tools.name: answer-video-question
tools.title: Answer YouTube Video Question
tools.description: Answer a user's question about a YouTube video by fetching its transcript. Use this when the user asks about the contents, claims, explanation, or context of a YouTube video. If no URL is provided, the tool can use a YouTube URL from the clipboard.

question.description: The user's question about the YouTube video. Do not include the YouTube URL unless it is part of the user's original question.

video.description: Optional YouTube video URL or video ID. Omit this when the user wants the extension to use the YouTube URL from the clipboard.

ai.instructions: Use the answer-video-question tool whenever the user asks a question about a YouTube video. Pass the YouTube URL or video ID when the prompt includes one. If the prompt does not include a URL, call the tool without the video argument so it can inspect the clipboard. Do not answer questions about the video from general knowledge; use the transcript-backed tool result.
